channel.title: Projects on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: PixelQuest — A Retro Platformer
item.description: A canvas-based platformer built from scratch with JavaScript. Features procedural level generation and pixel art assets.

item.title: TermDash — Terminal Dashboard
item.description: A CLI dashboard showing system metrics, git stats, and calendar events. Built with Rust and Ratatui.

item.title: AstroForge — Static Site Starter
item.description: A opinionated Astro starter template for developer blogs with dark mode, RSS, and MDX support.

item.title: NoiseGen — Procedural Texture Library
item.description: A TypeScript library for generating procedural textures using Perlin noise, Worley noise, and fractal Brownian motion.

item.title: Dotfiles v3
item.description: My dotfiles restructured with chezmoi. Cross-platform, templated, and encrypted secrets.

item.title: Chip8 Emulator
item.description: A Chip8 emulator in Rust with SDL2 rendering. Great way to learn about emulation and instruction sets.

item.title: Game Jam 2025 Entry
item.description: A 48-hour game jam entry — a gravity-flipping puzzle game. Didn’t place but had a blast building it.

item.title: Windows on Arm Pitfalls
item.description: A brief guide to common issues when running Windows on ARM devices. Covers app compatibility gaps, driver limitations, and performance caveats.

item.title: Cross-platform dotfiles using chezmoi
item.description: A portable dotfile setup automated with chezmoi, enabling consistent configuration across machines. Includes templating, secrets handling, and reproducible environment setup.

item.title: Windows Productivity Setup
item.description: A productivity setup for software developers

item.title: Markdown Note Viewer
item.description: A small Electron app for browsing and searching markdown notes stored in a local folder.
